def get_orders_with_users(order_ids: list[int]) -> list[dict]:
    orders = (
        session.query(Order)
        .filter(Order.id.in_(order_ids))
        .options(selectinload(Order.user))
        .all()
    )
    return [{"order": o, "user": o.user} for o in orders]


def enrich_products(category_ids: list[int]) -> list[dict]:
    categories = (
        session.query(Category)
        .filter(Category.id.in_(category_ids))
        .options(selectinload(Category.products))
        .all()
    )
    return [{"category": c, "products": c.products} for c in categories]


def build_invoice(order_id: int) -> dict:
    order = (
        session.query(Order)
        .filter(Order.id == order_id)
        .options(
            selectinload(Order.items),
            selectinload(Order.customer),
        )
        .first()
    )
    return {"order": order, "items": order.items, "customer": order.customer}
